posts.message:
🚜Meet us at the Farmers Market! 🐓🐖
📌Dolgeville - Plowe Park 
⏰9-1! 

Come and see us! 😍

Peep the duckling Willow wants to bring home! 🥰

Did Memorial Day weekend creep up on anyone else?? 🤪
Haven’t even planned what to eat this weekend?
We’ve got you covered! 🍗
Chicken leg quarters, thighs, drumsticks — we’ve got it all! 🙂
Plus PORK CUTS! 🥓
We’ll be at the Dolgeville Farmers Market this Saturday from 9–1!
If you’d like anything special, send us a message to reserve your order for market pick-up!

🌿 See You at the Farmers Market Today! 🌿
We’ll be at the farmers market from 9:00 AM to 1:00 PM today with a fresh selection from Roswell Family Farm!

🐓 Fresh chicken cuts 
🐖 Farm-raised pork cuts
🥚 Chicken & duck eggs
🌸 Beautiful hanging baskets and planters

Stop by to stock up on your favorites, say hello, and support local agriculture! We can’t wait to see you there.
#RoswellFamilyFarm #FarmersMarketDay #ShopLocal #FreshFromTheFarm #SupportSmallBusiness #FarmFresh #DolgevilleNY
